vocab.meaning: trạng thái tâm trí trầm mặc/suy tư
vocab.example: Gazing at the rolling hills during a long car ride often puts me in a contemplative state of mind.

vocab.meaning: một chuỗi hình ảnh nối tiếp nhau (như phim)
vocab.example: The bus journey offers a rolling montage of rural life that I find far more engaging than any mobile app.

vocab.meaning: những khoảnh khắc/hình ảnh lướt qua nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I love catching fleeting snapshots of local villages as we speed past them on the highway.
There is a certain transitory beauty in the way the light hits the fields for just a second before the vehicle turns.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường theo cách thiếu quy hoạch)
vocab.example: Looking out the window allows me to observe the gradual transition from dense urban sprawl to open countryside.

vocab.meaning: kiến thức/sự am hiểu về địa lý
vocab.example: Watching the changing terrain helps improve my geographic literacy regarding the regions I'm traversing.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn/xua tan sự nhàm chán
vocab.example: Observing the intricate details of the landscape is my favorite way to stave off boredom during tedious commutes.

vocab.meaning: sự thưởng thức/trân trọng vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: The trip provided an opportunity for pure aesthetic appreciation of the natural rock formations.

vocab.meaning: sự đắm chìm trong tầm nhìn toàn cảnh
vocab.example: Sitting by the window offers a sense of panoramic immersion that makes the travel time feel much shorter.
I am often mesmerized by the rhythmic passing of trees and telegraph poles against the horizon.
